description:
Advances: specled.realized_by

Deliverable:
Add SpecLedEx.Realization.HashStore.merge/2 that deep-merges per-tier seed entries into the existing realization map persisted at <root>/.spec/state.json. write/2 keeps its replacement semantics and is unchanged. merge/2 stamps hasher_version on entries that lack it (reuse ensure_version/1) and atomic-writes via the existing path.

Verification:
- Tests to pass: hash_store_test.exs covers (a) merge into empty state.json creates the realization key; (b) merge preserves non-seeded tier entries; (c) merge replaces a same-key entry; (d) merge stamps hasher_version on entries that lack it.
- Behaviors to demonstrate: spec scenario specled.realized_by.silent_seed_uses_merge becomes verifiable.

Out of Scope (files):
- lib/specled_ex/realization/orchestrator.ex (S5)
- lib/specled_ex/realization/canonical.ex (S3)
- lib/specled_ex/realization/api_boundary.ex (S4)
- lib/specled_ex/realization/implementation.ex (S4/S5)
- .spec/**
Allowed touches:
- lib/specled_ex/realization/hash_store.ex
- test/specled_ex/realization/hash_store_test.exs

Out of Scope (intent):
- Do NOT change write/2's existing semantics.
- Do NOT touch refresh_and_commit_hashes/3 in the orchestrator.
- No new public functions besides merge/2.

Merge gate:
- [ ] Code compiles cleanly
- [ ] Tests listed above pass
- [ ] Spec verification passes
- [ ] Scope check: diff touches only Allowed globs (mechanical)
- [ ] Auditor APPROVE comment on the ticket
title: S1: HashStore.merge/2
